---
title: "CV"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

<center>
[<i class="fa fa-file-pdf"></i> Download PDF](content/cv_lemus-canovas.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
</center>

<br>

## Education

**PhD in Geography (Climatology)**  
*University of Barcelona, 2015–2021*  
Dissertation: *Extreme Precipitation Events in the Pyrenees: A Multi-Scale Analysis*  
Supervisors: Joan A. López-Bustins, Javier Martin-Vide

**BSc in Applied Data Science** *(in progress)*  
*Open University of Catalonia (UOC), 2021–present*

**MSc in Meteorology**  
*University of Barcelona*

---

## Positions

**Postdoctoral Researcher**  
*Andorra Research + Innovation, 2022–present*  
Research on climate change and high-resolution climate projections for the Pyrenees.

**Predoctoral Researcher**  
*University of Barcelona (Climatology Group), 2015–2021*

---

## Selected Publications

See the full list on my [Research](research.qmd) page or [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iOCaO7sAAAAJ).

---

## Skills

| Category | Tools |
|---|---|
| Programming | R, Python |
| Climate data | NetCDF, ERA5, EURO-CORDEX, STEAD |
| R packages | tidyverse, metR, synoptReg, ggplot2 |
| Version control | Git, GitHub |
| Writing | RMarkdown, Quarto, LaTeX |

---

## Awards & Grants

- **FI Predoctoral Fellowship**, Generalitat de Catalunya (AGAUR), 2017–2021

---

`r source("_common.R"); last_updated()`
